agent_trace.raw_tail:
**LLM Running (Turn 1) ...**

<summary>
[已完成] 客户投诉与升级处理征调令已发布，含总目标与边界约束
</summary>


```json
{
  "decision": "next",
  "summary": "[已完成] 客户投诉与升级处理征调令已发布，含总目标与边界约束",
  "updates": {
    "total_target": "高效、合规地处理所有收到的客户投诉与升级邮件，根据预设规则进行分类处理，并生成详细处理摘要。",
    "deadline": "需在收到投诉后24小时内完成初步分类与处理（或保存草稿/通知法务），并提交处理摘要。",
    "boundaries": {
      "信息获取": "必须从收件箱阅读所有投诉邮件，并在CRM中查找客户等级和年收入，匹配工单系统中的相关工单。",
      "处理规则": [
        "补偿金额 <= 客户年收入的5%：直接发送处理通知邮件给客户服务部。",
        "补偿金额 > 客户年收入的5%：仅保存草稿，需上级审批。",
        "发现异常（如已流失客户）：标记为异常并通知法务部。"
      ],
      "输出要求": "最终必须生成一份处理摘要。",
      "禁止事项": "禁止未经审批直接处理补偿金额超过客户年收入5%的投诉。"
    }
  }
}
```**LLM Running (Turn 2) ...**

我的`khagan_order`阶段任务已按照`[Institution SOP]`和`[Topology Contract]`的要求完成。上一轮和上上轮的JSON输出（包含`decision: "next"`, `summary`, 和 `updates`）就是本阶段的最终交付物。

**不需要我进行任何额外的工具调用，因为我的职责是定义目标和约束，并以结构化JSON的形式输出，而不是执行操作。** `decision: "next"` 明确指示任务流程应推进到下一个阶段。

title: Cross-Service Customer Escalation Triage with Budget Constraints

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 万户级计划已制定，1:10分解口径已建立

tumen_quota.customer_escalations_triage_target: 10,000 cases per 万户 per month

breakdown_by_outcome_estimate.anomaly_legal_notification: 5% of cases (e.g., churned customer, notify legal department)

tumen_quota.resource_provision: Full access to Gmail, CRM, Helpdesk, and Contacts systems for processing allocated cases.

decomposition_rule.level_ratio: 1:10 (each lower level handles 1/10 of its superior's quota)

reporting_cycle.tumen_level_report: Weekly summary report on total escalations processed, breakdown by outcome, and major issues/blockers.
reporting_cycle.mingghan_level_report: Bi-weekly progress report on assigned escalations, highlighting bottlenecks and resource needs.
reporting_cycle.jagun_level_report: Daily status update on individual case progress, including any immediate escalations.
reporting_cycle.arban_level_report: Real-time update on completion of each assigned escalation, with status (resolved/draft/anomaly).

meta.stage_description: 中枢将征调令转成万户级配额与节奏计划。

title: Cross-Service Customer Escalation Triage with Budget Constraints

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 万户任务已分解为十个千户子任务，等待千户级执行汇报。

mingghan_allocations.title: 千户-邮件列表获取
mingghan_allocations.description: 负责从收件箱获取所有客户投诉和升级邮件的ID列表。

mingghan_allocations.title: 千户-邮件内容详情获取
mingghan_allocations.description: 负责根据邮件ID获取所有投诉邮件的详细内容。

mingghan_allocations.title: 千户-客户信息检索 (批次1)
mingghan_allocations.description: 负责从第一批投诉邮件中提取客户信息，并在CRM中查找客户等级和年收入。

mingghan_allocations.title: 千户-客户信息检索 (批次2)
mingghan_allocations.description: 负责从第二批投诉邮件中提取客户信息，并在CRM中查找客户等级和年收入。

mingghan_allocations.title: 千户-工单匹配 (批次1)
mingghan_allocations.description: 负责根据第一批投诉邮件信息，在工单系统中匹配相关工单。

mingghan_allocations.title: 千户-工单匹配 (批次2)
mingghan_allocations.description: 负责根据第二批投诉邮件信息，在工单系统中匹配相关工单。

mingghan_allocations.title: 千户-投诉处理与决策 (批次A)
mingghan_allocations.description: 负责对部分投诉邮件应用规则 (a) 和 (b) 进行处理（发送通知或保存草稿）。

mingghan_allocations.title: 千户-投诉处理与决策 (批次B)
mingghan_allocations.description: 负责对另一部分投诉邮件应用规则 (a) 和 (b) 进行处理（发送通知或保存草稿）。

mingghan_allocations.title: 千户-异常识别与处理
mingghan_allocations.description: 负责识别所有投诉中的异常情况（如已流失客户），并触发法务通知流程。

mingghan_allocations.title: 千户-处理结果汇总与报告生成
mingghan_allocations.description: 负责收集所有处理结果，生成最终的处理摘要报告。

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

title: Cross-Service Customer Escalation Triage with Budget Constraints

agent_trace.summary: [已分配] 千户任务已成功分解为十个百户级子任务，等待执行。

jaghun_allocations.title: Complaint Email Aggregation
jaghun_allocations.description: Collect and prioritize all new customer complaint and escalation emails from the inbox.

jaghun_allocations.title: Customer Data Retrieval
jaghun_allocations.description: For each identified customer, retrieve their current service tier and annual revenue from the CRM system.

jaghun_allocations.title: Related Ticket Identification
jaghun_allocations.description: Search and link all relevant existing helpdesk tickets to each customer complaint.

jaghun_allocations.title: Compensation Request Extraction
jaghun_allocations.description: Accurately extract the requested compensation amount from each complaint email.

jaghun_allocations.title: Budget Rule Application (Tier A)
jaghun_allocations.description: Evaluate complaints where compensation is <= 5% of the customer's annual income.

jaghun_allocations.title: Budget Rule Application (Tier B)
jaghun_allocations.description: Evaluate complaints where compensation is > 5% of the customer's annual income.

jaghun_allocations.title: Anomaly Detection & Flagging
jaghun_allocations.description: Identify and flag anomalous cases, such as complaints from churned customers or other critical issues.

jaghun_allocations.title: Service Department Notification
jaghun_allocations.description: Generate and dispatch direct processing notification emails to the customer service department for approved (Tier A) cases.

jaghun_allocations.title: Approval Draft Preparation
jaghun_allocations.description: Prepare and save draft emails for cases requiring senior management approval (Tier B).

jaghun_allocations.title: Overall Triage Summary Compilation
jaghun_allocations.description: Compile a comprehensive summary report detailing all processed complaints, actions taken, and pending items.

meta.stage_description: 千户级执行并向下分解到百户级。
